abilities.description: Exile target card from a graveyard. When a creature card is exiled this way, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.
abilities.target_prompt: Choose target card in a graveyard

statics.description: You may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to activate abilities of creatures you control.
Creatures you control with +1/+1 counters on them have all activated abilities of all creature cards exiled with CARDNAME.
